data.title: Global Healthy Living Foundation is expanding access to education and clinical trial info for Spanish-speaking lupus communities with new centers reaching new patients.
data.description: New patients are being reached by the English and Spanish Language Lupus Help Centers operated by GHLF in Upper Nyack, New York. The centers have reported an increase in their outreach efforts to assist individuals living with lupus, with a significant rise in the number of patients seeking support. The enhanced services provided by the centers have proven to be effective in catering to the needs of both English and Spanish-speaking individuals affected by lupus in the area.

data.title: Bitcoin is down 7.5% since Christmas Eve 2024, following a pattern where it has seen average gains of 126% the following year in three prior instances, with Bitcoin fell between 51.4% to 70.8% on Christmas Eve in 2014, 2018, and 2022, and rallied from 40.9% to 159.8% the next year.
data.description: Since Christmas Eve 2024, Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) has experienced a 7.5% decline, potentially indicating a trend that has historically resulted in significant gains the following year. This pattern has occurred three times in the past 12 years: in 2014, 2018, and 2022. In each instance, Bitcoin recorded a year-over-year decrease on Christmas Eve, followed by impressive rallies the subsequent year. For example, in 2014, Bitcoin dropped by 51.4% to $323, but saw a 40.9% increase in 2015. In 2018, it crashed by 70.8% to $4,079, only to surge by 79.4% in 2019. Similarly, in 2022, Bitcoin declined by 66.9% to $16,822, and then experienced a significant 159.8% increase in 2023. On average, Bitcoin fell by 63% on these three Christmas Eves and then gained 126.4% the following year. The current trajectory of Bitcoin in 2025 appears to follow this established pattern.

data.title: AKEEYO to present 2 innovative camera systems at CES 2026: AKY-NV-X2 mirror dash cam and AKY-730 Pro, elevating vehicle intelligence.
data.description: In Shenzhen, China, on December 24, 2025, AKEEYO is set to showcase advanced vehicle intelligence at CES 2026 through the introduction of two groundbreaking camera systems. The AKY-NV-X2, an 11-inch mirror dash cam, is tailored for car drivers, whereas the AKY-730 Pro action camera offers top-tier safeguarding for professionals.

data.description: The amount of venture capital funding for crypto gaming drastically decreased this year, leading to the closure of numerous games and the disbandment of player communities.

data.title: Morocco Telecom Operators Report analyzes market with detailed forecasts up to 2029, providing key info and insights.
data.description: Dublin - A new report, "Morocco Telecom Operators Country Intelligence Report," is now available through ResearchAndMarkets.com. This report offers a comprehensive overview of the telecommunications market in Morocco, including forecasts for key indicators until 2029. Updated yearly, the report analyzes current opportunities and competitive dynamics, as well as demand trends based on service type and technology/platform in areas such as fixed telephony and broadband.

data.title: Thor Equities receives $18.25M financing from Centennial Bank for Wynwood sites in Miami's 2nd Avenue area.
data.description: In New York, NY on December 19, 2025, Thor Equities Group, a prominent figure in urban real estate development, leasing, and management, revealed a recent financial achievement. The company successfully obtained $18,250,000 in financing from Centennial Bank. This funding is allocated for properties situated at 2724 NW 2nd Avenue and 2825 NW 2nd Avenue within the Wynwood district of Miami.

data.title: Clairvest has successfully sold its interests in F12.net, with a majority investment from a private equity firm and equity reinvestment from shareholders. Founder & CEO Alex Webb is included in the executive team.
data.description: On December 12, 2025, Clairvest Group Inc. (TSX: CVG) revealed the sale of its stakes in F12.net. The deal involved a primary investment from a distinguished middle-market private equity firm and a significant equity reinvestment from current F12 shareholders and the leadership team, such as Founder & CEO Alex Webb. The entity made this announcement without specifying the buyer's terms or the total amount involved in the transaction.

data.title: Qualstar Corporation to reincorporate in Nevada and split its common stock 3:1.
data.description: The plan involves a split of the company's common stock at a ratio of 3:1.

data.title: Geron Corp reveals plan for long-term growth, amidst strategic restructuring for value creation.
data.description: According to recent data, the global economy is projected to grow by approximately 4.5% this year, marking a significant recovery from the 3.5% contraction experienced in 2020. The international trade volume is expected to increase by around 8%, led by strong performances in the manufacturing and technology sectors. Additionally, the number of unemployed individuals worldwide has decreased to 187 million, down from 220 million in the previous year. This positive trend is attributed to the ongoing vaccination campaigns and government stimulus measures aimed at boosting economic activity.Experts predict that these trends will continue in the coming months, with the global economy showing signs of resilience and rebuilding after the challenges faced during the pandemic.
